creator: emaste@phaedrus.sandvine.ca
text:
I'm using this controller on RELENG_6 i386 and amd64 without issue now,
so I think my recent merges from Adaptec's drivers and elsewhere have
probably solved your issue.

If it still panics for you with RELENG_6 from CVS, please obtain a
kernel core file by following the directions at

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug.html

-Ed
